name: Morimoto's Sushi Master
overview: Chef Masaharu Morimoto tests the sushi skills of eight expert chefs, alongside fellow judges J. Kenji-Alt and Dakota Weiss. The chefs create sushi platters, Omakase service and more, hoping to win a cash prize and the title of Sushi Master.

trailers.title: Morimoto's Sushi Master | Official Trailer | The Roku Channel
